content.problemStatement:
You are given a tree with NNN nodes (numbered 111 through NNN) and N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 edges. Each node has a value; let's denote the value of node xxx by WxW_xWx‚Äč.

Next, let's define the value of a simple path v1,v2,‚Ä¶,vkv_1, v_2, \dots, v_kv1‚Äč,v2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,vk‚Äč as ‚ąĎi=1ki‚čÖWvi\sum_{i=1}^k i \cdot W_{v_i}‚ąĎi=1k‚Äči‚čÖWvi‚Äč‚Äč. A simple path in a tree is a sequence of nodes v1,v2,‚Ä¶,vkv_1, v_2, \dots, v_kv1‚Äč,v2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,vk‚Äč such that:


k‚Č•1k \ge 1k‚Č•1
there is an edge between nodes viv_ivi‚Äč and vi+1v_{i+1}vi+1‚Äč for each iii (1‚Č§i‚Č§k‚ąí11 \le i \le k-11‚Č§i‚Č§k‚ąí1)
vi‚Č†vjv_i \neq v_jvi‚ÄčÓÄ†=vj‚Äč for each i,ji, ji,j (1‚Č§i,j‚Č§k1 \le i, j \le k1‚Č§i,j‚Č§k) such that i‚Č†ji \neq jiÓÄ†=j
You should find the maximum of values of all simple paths in the given tree.
constraints: the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 400,000400,000400,000
the graph described in the input is a tree
Subtasks**Subtask #1 (30 points):** the tree is a binary tree rooted at node 1
the length (number of nodes) of any simple path in the tree is at most 200200200
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 100,000100,000100,000
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers W1,W2,‚Ä¶,WNW_1, W_2, \dots, W_NW1‚Äč,W2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,WN‚Äč.
Each of the following N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 lines contains two space-separated integers uuu and vvv denoting an edge between nodes uuu and vvv.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ‚ÄĒ the maximum value of a simple path.
